title: SDD CI Hardening
description: Tighten SDD gate to require `validated`/`done` on PRs to protected branches.
trigger: When current SDD baseline is stable for one full sprint.
value_prop: PRs to main blocked when no validated/done SDD exists; advisory on develop.

title: Process Metrics
description: Add SDD process KPIs (spec coverage, lead time impact, rework ratio).
trigger: When at least 10 PRs have passed through current SDD gate.
value_prop: Spec coverage, avg lead time, rework ratio available as KPIs at any time.
Advisory findings no longer block commits; only real errors reject the push.
title: Check Noise Reduction
description: Reduce non-actionable CI warnings and improve blocking/advisory classification.
trigger: When warning volume affects merge throughput.

title: Sync Drift Prevention
description: Add periodic drift report for Foundation vs consumers manifests/skills.
value_prop: Declared skills/MCP/backlog refs validated against actual filesystem on demand.
PR reviewers can verify spec coverage and validation evidence at a glance.
title: PR Template Quality
description: Standardize PR templates to include spec traceability and validation evidence.
trigger: When next workflow template update is scheduled.
resolved_by: .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md: added SDD ref input, spec status dropdown, validation evidence textarea.

title: Local Workflow Performance
description: Profile and optimize `wf health/verify` runtime for faster local loops.
trigger: When local validation runtime exceeds agreed SLO.
value_prop: wf commands profiled against SLO; PASS/WARN/FAIL output + report saved to reports/wf-benchmark.json.
Tasks gated dynamically: AI blocked at HARD_LIMIT, warned at SOFT_LIMIT, blocked offline. Event-bus rate-limit contributes to gate decision.
title: Runtime Router Gating
description: Dynamic gating based on real runtime load: token usage, event-bus rate limits, network/AI availability.
trigger: When runtime mode detection is needed before task execution.
resolved_by: runtime-router.ps1 -Mode gate -TaskType (ai|heavy-ai|network|local|metrics|any) + rate-limit integration + wf runtime-gate [type].
